value.body:
## Summary

Evaluate and upgrade `react-router` in `@cycle/desktop` from 7.17.0 to 8.0.1.

## Affected manifest

- `packages/desktop/package.json`

## Rationale

`pnpm outdated --recursive --format json` reports a new major version. The desktop renderer uses React Router for hash-based workspace navigation, so this should be treated as a behavior-sensitive upgrade rather than a blind version bump.

## Verification

- Review React Router 8 migration notes before changing the dependency.
- Run `pnpm --filter @cycle/desktop typecheck`.
- Smoke test workspace navigation, issue detail routes, repository routes, create issue flow, browser history/back behavior, and any shortcut-driven navigation.

frontmatter.title: Evaluate and upgrade React Router to 8.0.1

value.title: Evaluate and upgrade React Router to 8.0.1
